title: Lead Revenue Manager at McDonald's India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at McDonald's India
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
